title: Intune Analytics - Security Posture

tiles.title: 🔐 Encryption Rate
tiles.query:
ManagedDevices_Current
| summarize Encrypted=countif(IsEncrypted == true), Total=count()
| project round(100.0 * Encrypted / Total, 1)

tiles.title: ✅ Compliance Rate
tiles.query:
ManagedDevices_Current
| summarize Compliant=countif(ComplianceState == 'compliant'), Total=count()
| project round(100.0 * Compliant / Total, 1)

tiles.title: ⚠️ Unencrypted Devices
tiles.query: ManagedDevices_Current | where IsEncrypted == false or isnull(IsEncrypted) | count

tiles.title: 📊 Security Summary by OS
tiles.query:
ManagedDevices_Current
| summarize 
    Total=count(),
    Compliant=countif(ComplianceState == 'compliant'),
    Encrypted=countif(IsEncrypted == true),
    Supervised=countif(IsSupervised == true)
    by OperatingSystem
| extend 
    ComplianceRate=round(100.0 * Compliant / Total, 1),
    EncryptionRate=round(100.0 * Encrypted / Total, 1)
| project OperatingSystem, Total, ComplianceRate, EncryptionRate, Supervised
| order by Total desc

tiles.title: 🔓 Unencrypted Devices
tiles.query:
ManagedDevices_Current
| where IsEncrypted == false or isnull(IsEncrypted)
| project DeviceName, UserPrincipalName, OperatingSystem, Model, ComplianceState, LastSyncDateTime
| order by LastSyncDateTime desc
| take 25

tiles.title: ❌ Non-Compliant by Policy
tiles.query:
ComplianceSummaryByPolicy()
| where NonCompliant > 0
| project PolicyName, NonCompliant, ComplianceRate
| order by NonCompliant desc
| take 10

tiles.title: 🔴 Devices with Most Policy Failures
tiles.query:
DeviceComplianceStates_Current
| where Status == 'noncompliant'
| summarize FailedPolicies=count(), Policies=make_set(PolicyName) by DeviceId, DeviceName
| order by FailedPolicies desc
| take 15
| project DeviceName, FailedPolicies, Policies

tiles.title: ⏰ Devices in Grace Period
tiles.query:
DeviceComplianceStates_Current
| where Status == 'inGracePeriod'
| summarize Count=count() by PolicyName
| order by Count desc

tiles.title: 📈 Compliance Trend (7 days)
tiles.query:
DeviceComplianceStates
| where IngestionTime > ago(7d)
| summarize 
    Compliant=countif(Status == 'compliant'),
    NonCompliant=countif(Status == 'noncompliant')
    by bin(IngestionTime, 1d)
| extend ComplianceRate = round(100.0 * Compliant / (Compliant + NonCompliant), 1)
| project IngestionTime, ComplianceRate

tiles.title: 📱 Jailbroken/Rooted Devices
tiles.query:
ManagedDevices_Current
| where ComplianceState has 'jailBroken' or ComplianceState has 'rooted'
| project DeviceName, UserPrincipalName, OperatingSystem, ComplianceState, LastSyncDateTime

tiles.title: 🆕 Newly Non-Compliant (Last 6h)
tiles.query:
AlertNewNonCompliant()
| take 15
| project DeviceName, UserDisplayName, PolicyName, DetectedAt

description: Security posture overview - encryption status, compliance rates, policy failures, and security alerts.
